title: GOOD: spendable_notes(0) as dual-subsystem oracle
description: The receive-side assertion in e2e_testnet.rs uses spendable_notes(0) as its oracle rather than balance() alone. spendable_notes() requires both plaintext columns non-null (IVK decryption, nie-gw8k) and a populated Merkle witness (nie-7766). A non-empty result is therefore a conjunction: IVK decryption worked AND witness tracking is correct. Neither subsystem alone produces a passing result. The inline comment at the assertion site makes this reasoning explicit: 'it is the single assertion that proves both.' This is a stronger oracle than checking balance because balance counts any stored satoshi value; spendable_notes demands the cryptographic machinery is complete.
